exploration_notes: The CSS style change to WebRender pipeline flows through 5 key C++ files: (1) **Style change notification**: `RestyleManager::PostRestyleEvent` in `layout/style/RestyleManager.cpp` queues restyle hints and change hints on elements. (2) **Frame style recomputation**: `RestyleManager::ProcessPendingRestyles` → `DoProcessPendingRestyles` runs Servo style traversal and calls `ProcessRestyledFrames` to apply nsChangeHints to frames, all in `RestyleManager.cpp`.
